case_title: UYGUR, SAMI VS KRUGUER BROS. BUILDERS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,160.00 FILED BY UYGUR, SAMI AS TO DEFENDANT KRUGUER BROS. BUILDERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-31-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-13-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 12-13-02 @ 1:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-22-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-31-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UYGUR, SAMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRUGUER BROS. BUILDERS INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.
